authors.author: Eva-Lena Hellmark
Eva-Lena Hellmark
Dir gebührt die Ehre (Denn du bist groß)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You deserve the Glory and the Honor Lord we lift our hands to worship you As we lift Your Holy Name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You deserve the Glory and the Honor Lord we lift our hands to worship you As we lift Your holy Name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For You are Great You do miracles so Great There is no One else like You There is no One else like You For You are Great You do miracles so Great There is no One else like You There is no One else like You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Glorify Thy Name Glorify Thy Name Glorify Thy Name in all the earth
